history.qwen_observation: Step upgrade_plugins_for_java17 failed with a Derive4J FilerException (Attempt to recreate a file), caused by the maven-compiler-plugin version bump altering how annotation processor generated sources are managed.
history.qwen_rationale: Removing the aggressive UpgradePluginsForJava17 step avoids the annotation processor conflict. UpgradeBuildToJava17 will handle the necessary source/target property changes, and we can address specific plugin versions later if compilation fails on JDK 17.
